title: Railway Deploy Service Template
description: Service template defining reusable service configuration. Templates support %{param} placeholders that are resolved when referenced from an environment config.

params.description: Parameter definitions. Each param can be required or have a default value. Referenced in other fields as %{param_name}.

required.description: Whether this parameter must be provided by the environment config.

default.description: Default value if not provided by the environment config.

source.description: Service source — specify either 'image' or 'repo', not both. Supports %{param} placeholders.

variables.description: Default service variables. Supports %{param}, ${ENV_VAR}, and ${{service.VAR}} syntax. Set to null to mark for deletion.

domains.description: Custom domains for this service. Each item can be a string or an object with domain and target_port.

cron_schedule.description: Cron schedule (5-field format). Minimum interval on Railway is 5 minutes.

pre_deploy_command.description: Pre-deploy command(s) (e.g., DB migrations). Accepts a string or array of strings.

restart_policy_max_retries.description: Max retries for ON_FAILURE restart policy.

sleep_application.description: Enable serverless sleeping. Containers scale to zero when idle and wake on incoming requests.

watch_patterns.description: Gitignore-style patterns to trigger deploys based on changed file paths (e.g., '/src/**', 'package.json').

draining_seconds.description: Time in seconds between SIGTERM and SIGKILL during deployment teardown.

overlap_seconds.description: Time in seconds the old deployment overlaps with the new one during blue-green deploys.

ipv6_egress.description: Enable IPv6 outbound traffic for the service.

branch.description: GitHub branch to deploy from (e.g., 'main', 'develop'). Changes are auto-deployed from this branch.

check_suites.description: Wait for CI check suites (GitHub Actions) to complete before deploying.

registry_credentials.description: Registry credentials for private container images.

target_port.description: Target port for the Railway-provided domain.

railway_domain.description: Enable a Railway-provided domain (.up.railway.app). Set to true or specify target_port.

railway_config_file.description: Path to a Railway config file for the service.

static_outbound_ips.description: Enable static outbound IPs (egress gateways) for the service.
